description: Heuristic ranking weights for Dark Store Conditional ETC Engine

notes.sku_process_time: Seconds to scan and pick one SKU from a shelf slot
notes.row_change_penalty: Extra seconds added per unique row transition (aisle change)
notes.restock_delay_multiplier: Multiplier applied to base ETC when a required row is under restock (one-end access)
notes.cooler_row_constant: Flat seconds added per order line that touches a cooler row (C or D)
notes.backlog_threshold_seconds: Total ETC of Pending Pool (seconds) that triggers heuristic ranking. Default = 180s (3 minutes)
notes.cooler_rows: Row labels that carry the cooler_row_constant penalty
